description_long: This object is a compact audio mixing console, featuring a rectangular black chassis with a slightly angled control surface. The top panel is densely populated with multiple rows of rotary knobs, sliders, and buttons, each corresponding to different audio channels and functions. The left side of the device has a visible power cord extending outward, indicating its reliance on external AC power. The front edge is lined with various input and output jacks, likely for microphones, instruments, and speakers. Branding and labeling are visible on the top and sides, with the Behringer logo and model information. The overall build appears robust, with a combination of metal and plastic materials, designed for tabletop use in audio production or live sound environments.
description: A black audio mixing console with numerous knobs, sliders, and buttons, plus a visible power cord and branded labeling. The device is compact, rectangular, and designed for tabletop use.
description_view_0: The left side and top of the mixing console are visible, showing the power cord, input/output jacks, and a clear view of the control surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the front and right side, emphasizing the rows of sliders and the main control area.
description_view_2: The rear and right side are visible, showing the back panel and the arrangement of the control knobs and sliders.
description_view_3: The back and left side are shown, with the power cord fully extended and branding visible on the rear panel.
